.file-embed.background: rgb(196, 198, 205) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(224, 226, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(224, 226, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #e0e2ea 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#e0e2ea, color-mix(in srgb, #e0e2ea 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #e0e2ea 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#e0e2ea, color-mix(in srgb, #e0e2ea 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(224, 226, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(224, 226, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(224, 226, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(224, 226, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(224, 226, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(196, 198, 205) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
